{{CargoRelic
|name=Britland Postcard
|class_id=20065
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Demon God in Britland, the Traveler recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time or post it for likes!
|fame=13
|art=30
|fth=11
|civ=22
|tech=14
|ss1=Britland Museum Medal Output +5
|ss2=Britland Museum Medal Output +10
|ss3=Britland Museum Medal Output +15
|ss4=Britland Museum Medal Output +15
|ss7=Britland Museum Medal Output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
